hooks.command: sh -c 'command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { m="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/.multiplai-context-uv-warned"; if [ ! -f "$m" ] || [ -n "$(find "$m" -mmin +1440 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo "[multiplai-context] uv not found - the plugin hooks are disabled until it is installed. Tell the user to install uv: https://docs.astral.sh/uv"; echo "[multiplai-context] uv not found - install from https://docs.astral.sh/uv (hooks disabled until then)" >&2; touch "$m" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0; }; exec uv run --no-project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/session_start.py"'
